title: Relocate An AGV Without A Tote To The Missing Zone And Add It To RMS
summary: Restore the documented AGV distribution needed for start-up by identifying a zone missing an AGV, moving an AGV without a tote into that zone, and adding the moved AGV to RMS. The source states the required startup distribution is nine AGVs without totes in the system: five under the north rack and four under the south rack.
when_to_use: Use when the system has been started or is being prepared for start-up and the documented AGV-without-tote distribution is not present, specifically when a zone is missing an AGV and an AGV without a tote must be relocated into that zone and then added to RMS.
not_for: Do not use for AGV bump fault recovery.
Do not use for faulted AGV with tote recovery.
Do not use when physical AGV movement instructions or site-specific RMS entry steps are required but not available from this source.

responsibilities: Verify AGV-without-tote distribution against the documented startup requirement.
Select an AGV without a tote for relocation.
Relocate the AGV into the zone missing an AGV.
Add the moved AGV to RMS after relocation.

safety_notes: The source does not describe the physical movement method for the AGV; use site-specific safe handling instructions.
Do not invent RMS screens, commands, or confirmation indicators that are not provided in the source.
The source wording says 'started without nine totes' while the surrounding text discusses AGVs without totes; this inconsistency should be reviewed before operational use.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to identify AGV placement by zone
Means to move an AGV without a tote
Access to RMS to add the AGV after relocation

access_required: Access to identify AGV placement by zone
Access to RMS to add the AGV after relocation
system_preconditions: A zone is confirmed to be missing an AGV relative to the documented startup distribution.
An AGV without a tote is available for relocation.
Documented startup distribution reference is available: nine AGVs without totes in the system, with five under the north rack and four under the south rack.

steps.title: Identify the missing AGV zone against startup distribution
steps.purpose: Confirm that AGV distribution is incorrect and determine which zone is missing an AGV.
steps.instruction: Check AGV placement by zone against the documented startup distribution. Confirm whether the system has fewer than the required AGVs without totes in the expected locations and identify the zone that is missing an AGV.
steps.expected_result: A specific zone missing an AGV is identified relative to the documented startup distribution.
steps.healthy_condition: Nine AGVs without totes are present in the system, distributed as five under the north rack and four under the south rack.
steps.failure_condition: A zone is missing an AGV relative to the documented startup distribution.

actions.label: Verify AGV distribution
actions.exact_action: Identify that a zone is missing an AGV relative to the documented start-up distribution.

AGV system startup requires nine AGVs without totes present in the system, distributed as five under the north rack and four under the south rack.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: If the system is started without nine totes, an AGV without a tote will need to be moved into the zone that is missing an AGV.

steps.title: Move the AGV into the missing zone
steps.purpose: Restore the documented AGV distribution by placing the selected AGV into the zone missing an AGV.
steps.instruction: Move the selected AGV without a tote into the zone that is missing an AGV.
steps.expected_result: The missing zone now has the relocated AGV without a tote.
steps.healthy_condition: The relocated AGV is positioned in the zone that was missing an AGV.

steps.purpose: Return the relocated AGV to RMS tracking after it has been moved into the missing zone.
steps.instruction: After moving the AGV, add the moved AGV to RMS using the available AGV API Controls or site-specific RMS procedure.

steps.healthy_condition: The relocated AGV is present in RMS following the move.
steps.failure_condition: The AGV is not added to RMS, or the exact RMS steps cannot be completed from source-supported instructions.
